title: Lesson 35
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a person traveling in a vehicle but not driving it
words.example: Each passenger must show a ticket.

words.meaning: a person who takes photos as a job or hobby
words.example: The photographer took pictures of the wedding.

words.meaning: a person who flies an airplane
words.example: The pilot spoke to passengers before takeoff.

words.meaning: a teacher at a college or university
words.example: The professor explained the experiment clearly.

words.meaning: a person who collects and writes news stories
words.example: The reporter asked questions after the game.
The scientist studied water from the river.

words.meaning: a person who helps with office work and messages
words.example: The secretary answered the phone politely.

words.meaning: a person who serves in an army
words.example: The soldier carried food to the village.

words.meaning: a person who visits a place for pleasure
words.example: A tourist asked me the way to the castle.

words.meaning: a person who comes to a place for a short time
words.example: Every visitor must sign in at the desk.
